items.title: Otkriven Ferrari Luce: Teško je riječima opisati ovaj model
items.summary: FERRARI je predstavio Luce, svoj prvi potpuno električni automobil. S 1036 KS, pet sjedala i cijenom od 550.000 €, nudi doseg od 530 km i ubrzanje do 100 km/h za 2,5 sekunde.

items.title: Sonny Rollins, Jazz’s ‘Saxophone Colossus,’ Dies at 95
items.summary: Tenor saxophonist Sonny Rollins, the “Saxophone Colossus” who was schooled by bebop’s legends as a prized sideman and became their peer as a formidable leader, improviser and composer, has died, according to a social media post from his family.
